name: flow-03-event-creation-orchestrator
description: T59 EventCreationOrchestrator — ORCHESTRATION archetype. EventCreated stored before outbox enqueue (DNA-8). Idempotent by (organizerId, title, startsAt).

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: store-before-enqueue (DNA-8), idempotency by (organizerId, title, startsAt)
Retrieve ORCHESTRATION arch pattern for T59: store-before-enqueue, event creation idempotency
Break T59 into: idempotency check → storeDocument(EventCreated) → enqueue(EventCreated) → return result
Generate event-creation-orchestrator.service.ts — EventCreated stored before outbox enqueue (DNA-8). Idempotent by (organizerId, title, startsAt).
Named check validation: store_before_enqueue, idempotent_composite_key, dna8_ordering
Score generated code 0-100 against T59 iron rules: DNA-8 outbox ordering, composite-key idempotency
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
